scripts.pretrial:approve: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/terminal-ui build
scripts.pretrial:reset-paper: pnpm --filter @autopoly/contracts build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/db build && pnpm --filter @autopoly/terminal-ui build
